name: OCR-style duplicate-section shadow case
notes: Runs the existing OCR regression fixture through both legacy and a captured ODL OCR-stand-in path to compare duplicate reconciliation, note support, and continuation handling under noisy extraction conditions.
knownEvidenceLimitations: The OpenDataLoader side for this case uses the repo OCR regression fixture as a captured stand-in for degraded OCR/hybrid output, not a live local or live hybrid ODL parse.
